## Summary

Describe the change clearly.

## Checklist

- [ ] aligns with `docs/spec.md`
- [ ] tests added or updated as needed
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] user-facing docs updated if behavior changed

## Notes

Include anything reviewers should pay attention to, including behavior changes, edge cases, or follow-up work.
